title: Cognitio
description: A chaotic world with strong monsters and bosses and cool artifacts with powerful abilities.
body:
**Cognitio - This is a mod that adds a new dimension with strong monsters, cool artifacts and incredible bosses. There is a lot of content for dozens of hours of gameplay.
Present:
30+ Mobs
40+ Artifacts
20+ Achievements
This is my first mod, I made it for 3 months
I will be very glad if you record a video with my mod.**

_It is recommended to play the mod in conjunction with other mods, such as: Thaumcraft, industrialcraft 2, Twigh-light forest... In order to be able to get powerful equipment in these mods and then go to Cognitio, since the monsters there are quite strong._

To start the mod you will need to find a portal to a new dimension and make a book that will help you understand how to progress through the mod to reach the final boss and make the most powerful artifact
![Cognitionamicon](https://i.postimg.cc/sDXss5F9/cognitionamiconimg.png)

Here's a quick summary of what's in the mod in version 0.7.2 betta
![inv1](https://i.postimg.cc/2jqNtrn2/invtabb.png)
![inv2](https://i.postimg.cc/mg4xh9J5/invtabb2.png)
![inv3](https://i.postimg.cc/d0WgWx1b/invtabbb3.png)
![inv4](https://i.postimg.cc/gJQQpL34/invtabb4.png)

The mod has Latin names for items, as I was inspired by the mysticism of thaumcraft. Currently, the mod has 80% Russian translation. If you want me to translate the mod into another language, then let me know, I will try to do it correctly, but if there are any errors, you can write about them in the discord channel.



[Mod Lore](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1sSMjpoOhaSlCBuWurNDJMDmZSnUBwiDH?usp=sharing)
[Click for Discord Server](https://discord.gg/VPufgNSq)
